name: cpas-sandbox
description: CPAS Sandbox Debate System (Cowork_CPAS) — 2-session 16-turn architecture. v0.9.12: Extended Thinking references removed (Cowork Agent tool does not support ET parameter — all ET claims corrected to Opus 단독). v0.9.11: Internal Data Integrity Check. v0.9.10: NO PREAMBLE tag fix. v0.9.9: Asymmetric tag system, D-temperature 1-13, D-Q phase. Session 1 (Exploratory 8T) + Session 2 (Offensive 8T). Dynamic Data Filters. Log management via cpas-manager plugin.
